sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85223" key="polupodi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠποδ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἶνος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> wine <sense id="n85223.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flavoured with polypody,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
